content:
Hello, just been kinda enjoying the game but I'd like to get some direction on how to use my resources. I'm on chapter 5 of the story. 

Do I pull for wheels at this point? 
Do I use any more of these consumables?
Maybe a few team recs so I know what to invest into?
 (I was thinking liz/clem/lily/??? and miryiam/faros/sanga/??? Plus the units I already have leveled to 40+ for other teams)

I have about 150 standard and 150 limited pulls. I've been following the new player doc for what to buy from shops etc. Used the moonlight banner for thais and helot. 

Any help appreciated!

Hey there : )

Your roster seem pretty solid to me. Might want to pull for enlightenment but not a requirement at this point.
I would go for Saya E3 though. And at least Clem E1 + Murphy

About the selectors : if you used every one of your awakeners in at least 5 fights, you should have a rather accurate idea as to who you favor and who would benefit the most from duplicates.
For new mates, there's always the trial option under the "record" button from home page
Didn't you claim Aurita yet ? First one's free and shards are on the shop if you intent to play discard

I don't know how to claim aurita, I must have missed it. I saw the shard but I don't know how to get the character. Is it from the story?

I will probably try for Clem e1, and when Murphy rolls around maybe try for her. I don't think I have the resources currently to get Saya e3.

I'm ... actually not sure where to claim her. Might be a lvl lock on it though, I think it's around keeper lvl 40 and it's pretty obvious when she's available as I remember.
You can ask around in game-questions.
Murphy is currently running for 2 more days !
Along Clem and Hameln in the tri-select banner

Murhpy E1 gives retain to her sacrifice-recuction 3-cost, which lets you plan her exalt more easily.
E2 allows her to boost tentacles dmg with strike and defense
E3 helps regulate sacrifice generation ( 2% of, say, 1 000 HP is 20 sacrifice aka 40 dmg mitigated on exalt trigger).
But if you're low on pull, her E0 work fine already and I would prioritize Saya
Her E2 give embryo on strike and defense. That's a fair boost imo but would cost up to 18 000 silver if you're unlucky

Now, my very biaised recommendation for your teams :

- Saya-Thaïs-Aurita-Corpo ( this one is actually my main but is also very criticized so ... up to you )
- Murphy-Myriam-Tulu-Sanga
- Clem-Jenkins-Lily-Ramona
- GHelot-Helot-Aigis-Agripa
- Wanda-Celeste-Faros-Liz

Keep in mind I'm only a lil' more than a month old so there's obviously tweaking to be made.

You can get Corpo either from next week's banner or borrow her from a whale ( but remember you can only borrow once across all 5 waves )
Lightless realm for aurita according to chat and I pulled Murphy in 30 pulls, ezpz
Gotta love when the Gacha god smiles upon us u.u

1 copy of Corp, GHelot or Pollux can go as high as 18 k silver / 90 pulls.
Did you give Pollux a try yet ?
Also, GHelot is too straightforward for my taste but veterans highly recommand her.

I didn't try pollux. limited unit and I dunno when I can get them so I didn't bother. I will try corpo since you said they're coming up again. 

I already have e3 ghelot from the Moonless Guide so I'm kinda locked into that

Next banner comes in three days.
Clem, Murphy and Hameln will be replaced by Helot:Catena, Pollux and Corposant. Hence the question.

Heyo there : )

Depends how many pulls you got.

If you whale, then pulling a couple wouldn't hurt ( and getting your hands on Arachne would definitely help though you won't get her from standard ).

Ifyou're f2p, I would still recommand getting at least 4 of each realm to allow rotations in case you need to counter a specific mechanic

Also, I would recommand getting 1 copy of every wheel you need but then get back to realms to reach  your stopping points for enlightenment on each of your favorite awakeners before going wheeljail.

Honestly, I don't personnaly intend to chase after the wheels. I'm much more interested on the gameplay tweaks from enlightening.

So in your experience the SR wheels get the job done with the SSR wheels? Instead of kititng out your units with dual SSRs?

Also I would strictly be using the standard pulls we gain over time. Though Im not opposed to getting a couple packs/battle passes for the right reasons

I can't give you an absolute answer as I didn't dive into chapter 5 yet ( building my D-teams first ) but going for a +12 on a 50 % chance seems rather absurd for f2p.
So yeah, SSR + SR should do fine and that's actually consistent with other advices I've stumbled upon.
You might want to raise some of them to +3 though

100% agree with you on the +12 it such a strain on our pull economy ultimately why I asked the question hahaha
I think rounding out the roster for the two archetypes I dont have much coverage will be my best bet while also hoping I luck into a random limited SSR character as well

Agreed : )

After all, you need canon fodder for that D-zone
